_comment: Comprehensive logging hooks — captures all tool calls for monitoring

PreToolUse.hook: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ"); echo "{\"timestamp\":\"$TIMESTAMP\",\"event\":\"pre_tool_use\",\"tool\":\"$TOOL\"}" >> /tmp/claude-session.log; exit 0'
PreToolUse._comment: Log every tool call attempt with timestamp

PostToolUse.hook: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); STATUS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_output // empty" | head -c 200); TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ"); echo "{\"timestamp\":\"$TIMESTAMP\",\"event\":\"post_tool_use\",\"tool\":\"$TOOL\",\"status_preview\":\"$(echo $STATUS | tr '"' "'" | tr "\n" " " | head -c 100)\"}" >> /tmp/claude-session.log; exit 0'
PostToolUse._comment: Log every tool result with a preview of the output

PostToolUse.hook: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $TOOL: $FILE" >&2; fi; exit 0'
PostToolUse._comment: Show file operations in stderr for real-time visibility
